title: pecluma sursumcurrens
intro: Pecluma sursumcurrens, also known as the "uplifting fern," is a species of epiphytic fern native to Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off bacterial and fungal infections. Research suggests that Pecluma sursumcurrens may also provide various health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Pecluma sursumcurrens are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
